title: Fix footer background so Admin Sign In link text is legible

requirements.text: Update the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) so that the bottom section of the footer — where the 'Admin Sign In' link, visitor counters, and copyright text are displayed — has a background color that provides sufficient contrast for all text to be clearly readable. If the current footer background is dark (e.g., charcoal #2C2C2C), ensure all text and links in that area use a light color (e.g., warm beige #F5F0E8 or white #FFFFFF). If the footer background is light, use charcoal #2C2C2C for text. The 'Admin Sign In' link in particular must be fully visible without hovering, scrolling, or any user interaction. Apply consistent contrast-compliant color tokens from the existing design system to all text elements in the footer bottom bar.

quotes: change background color of bottom of web page where admin is located so words can be seen on the bottom of page

acceptanceCriteria: The footer bottom section background color is explicitly set so that all text within it (copyright, visitor counters, Admin Sign In link) is legible without hovering.
The 'Admin Sign In' link text is fully visible at resting state with sufficient contrast against the footer background.
Visitor counter labels ('Total Visits', 'Unique Visitors') are readable against the footer background.
Copyright text is readable against the footer background.
The chosen colors are sourced from the existing design system palette (warm beige #F5F0E8, charcoal #2C2C2C, or white #FFFFFF).
The fix is consistent across all viewport sizes (mobile, tablet, desktop).

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Only change Footer styling — do not alter layout structure or remove any existing footer content.
Use design system color tokens already defined in the project (warm beige #F5F0E8, charcoal #2C2C2C, white #FFFFFF).
nonGoals: Changing footer layout or content structure.
Adding new footer sections or links.
Modifying header or any other component outside the Footer.
